inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 adjusted net income ~$949M ÷ ~533M diluted shares (20-F adjusted NI reconciliation); owner-cash proxy for capital-light platform
inputs.normalization_note: Adjusted net income excludes PSU/tax one-offs per 20-F; operating cash flow R$12.0B not used as FCF₀ because client-money flows dominate broker balance sheet

bear.notes: Brazil rate shock, client-asset outflows, IFA competition compress take rate

base.notes: Client assets +8% FY25; adj NI +15% normalized to 7% owner-cash growth; exit 14× vs ~8.5× spot on adj EPS

bull.notes: Cards/loan cross-sell + institutional share gains; multiple re-rates toward LatAm wealth peers

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Other gross revenues loss R$2,458M FY2025 (13% of total revenue); burden in consolidated P&L, not separate terminal — 20-F segment table

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Cards TPV R$53B, loan portfolio R$35B, insurance cross-sell — growth in retail revenue path per 20-F KPI table

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Client assets are off-balance-sheet servicing; Lawrence full cash-flow on adjusted earnings sufficient

human_review.notes: First filing-grounded dive; confirm live price, BRL/USD, and whether to haircut FCF₀ for Other-segment drag with human.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
